title: convolvulus hystrix
intro: Convolvulus hystrix, also known as prickly bindweed or thorny bindweed, is a perennial flowering plant species in the morning glory family, Convolvulaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, promote wound healing, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. Convolvulus hystrix is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
